Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 200 

GAP_TIER_05 

LABEL: Gap Coverage on Tier 5 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether or not the Part D plan offers some cost sharing in the coverage gap for 
this tier. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: GAP_TIER_05 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: Y = Yes 
N = No 
9 = Not Applicable 
X = Unknown 

COMMENT: This variable was new in 2008. 

There are
